zh.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯培可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedict de Gernet於1136年出生在英國藍卡爾沃林頓時，他的父親Adam de Gernet16歲，母親Agnes Engaine16歲。他於1173年之前與Cecily在艾歐洛結婚。他在英國藍卡爾被列為forester of lancashire。他去世於1205年1月25日之後在英國藍卡爾斯培可。

zh-hans.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: 英国英格兰藍卡爾斯培可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedict de Gernet于1136年出生在英国藍卡爾沃林頓时，他的父亲Adam de Gernet16岁，母亲Agnes Engaine16岁。他于1173年之前与Cecily在艾歐洛结婚。他在英国藍卡爾被列为forester of lancashire。他去世于1205年1月25日之后在英国藍卡爾斯培可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: derivative of Middle High German gern ‘to desire’, a component of various ancient Germanic personal names such as Gernhard. Alternatively, a variant of Gernot .

variants.name: Gernot
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements gēr ‘spear’ + knōt- ‘(to) swing’.

nameMeanings.name: Benedict
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

en.lifeSummary: When Benedict de Gernet was born in 1136, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Gernet, was 16 and his mother, Agnes Engaine, was 16. He married Cecily before 1173, in Europe. His occupation is listed as forester of lancashire in Lancashire, England. He died after 25 January 1205, in Speke, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedict de Gernet est né en 1136, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Gernet, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Agnes Engaine, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Cecily avant 1173, à Europe. Sa profession de son indiquée est forester of lancashire à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 25 janvier 1205, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedict de Gernet 1136 in Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Gernet 16 und seine Mutter Agnes Engaine 16. Er hat vor 1173 in Europa Cecily geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als forester of lancashire in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 25. Januar 1205 in Speke, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedict de Gernet è nato il nel 1136 nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Gernet, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Engaine, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Cecily prima del 1173, nel Europa. La sua occupazione è indicata come forester of lancashire nel Lancashire, England. Morì dopo il 25 gennaio 1205, nel Speke, Lancashire, England.

ja.Speke, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスペク
ja.lifeSummary: Benedict de Gernetが1136年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで生まれた時，父Adam de Gernetは16歳，母Agnes Engaineは16歳であった。1173年以前にヨーロッパでCecilyと結婚した。イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はforester of lancashireと記録されている。彼は1205年1月25日以後にイギリスランカシュアイアスペクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedict de Gernet(이)가 1136년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Gernet(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Engaine(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1173년 이전 우럽에서 Cecily(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 forester of lancashire이었다. 그는 1205년 1월 25일 이후 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 사망했다.

mn.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: Speke, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedict de Gernet nasceu em 1136, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Gernet, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Engaine, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily antes 1173, em Europa. Sua profissão aparece como forester of lancashire em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 25 de janeiro de 1205, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedict de Gernet родился в 1136 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Gernet было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Engaine, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily перед 1173 г. в местности Европа.  Он работал по профессии forester of lancashire в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер после 25 январь 1205 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedict de Gernet nació en 1136, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Gernet, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Agnes Engaine, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Cecily antes de 1173, en Europa. Su ocupación registrada era forester of lancashire en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió después de 25 de enero de 1205, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
